CustomField.description: A GUID (Globally Unique Identifier) generated by a Record-Triggered Flow on record creation. This is the access key embedded in the volunteer submission URL. It prevents IDOR attacks - an attacker cannot enumerate valid submission URLs by guessing record IDs. Must never appear on page layouts, list views, or reports visible to external users. See docs/security.md and docs/decisions/use-guid-token-for-access-control.md.
CustomField.label: Unique Token
